task_description: Pivot MK from a standalone AI (with competing engines) into a thin orchestration layer on top of any LLM. Implement Option B (one clean LLM call per message), build reliable tool-use framework, make it token-efficient for free API usage, and enhance personal memory so MK deeply knows Mohammed.

verification.summary: make full-test passes: 80 tests, 460 assertions, 0 failures. Build succeeds with only 6 pre-existing unused-variable warnings. All new tests exercise real code paths (orchestrator, tool registry, tool executor, context builder, memory persistence, fact extraction).
